title: SmoothMenu Reloaded
description: Removes the main menu FPS limit. 26.1+ port of SmoothMenu by BookerCatch
body:
If you have a high refresh rate monitor, you may have noticed that the main menu feels choppy and unresponsive when dragging the cursor around. This mod corrects that by uncapping the 60fps limit in the main menu.

This is a port, original mod can be found [here](https://github.com/BookerCatch/SmoothMenu/). Please, do not report issues related to this fork to original mod's repository
